name: Cobb Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds chicken breast, cooked and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard boil eggs and set aside.
2. Cook bacon until not-too-soft-not-too-crisp; dice and set aside.
3. Dice cooked chicken breast.
4. Chop iceberg lettuce, romaine lettuce, watercress, tomato, and green onion.
5. Cube avocados and hardboiled eggs.
6. Toss together all salad ingredients.
7. Blend together water, red wine vinegar, sugar, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, dry mustard, olive oil, vegetable oil, and garlic to make a dressing.
8. Just before serving, toss the salad with the dressing.
